name: BarComponent
description:
The Bar component is a container that holds titles, buttons and input controls.
Its content is distributed in three areas - left, middle and right.
The Bar has 2 modes - Desktop (default) and Tablet/Mobile (cozy).

inputs.name: barDesign
inputs.description:
Whether the Bar component is used as a header, subheader, header-with-subheader,
footer or floating-footer.
Types available: 'header' | 'subheader' | 'header-with-subheader' | 'footer' | 'floating-footer'

inputs.name: clear
inputs.description: Whether the Bar component should remove the box-shadow on the bottom.

inputs.name: inHomePage
inputs.description: Whether the Bar component is used in Home Page Layout.

inputs.name: inPage
inputs.description: Whether the Bar component is used in Page Layout.

inputs.name: initialSuggestionSubline
inputs.description: Whether this bar is to be used for the search results initial suggestion subline.

inputs.name: initialSuggestionTitle
inputs.description: Whether this bar is to be used for the search results initial suggestion title.

inputs.name: role
inputs.description:
Aria role for the Bar
default is toolbar

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
The size of the Page in Page responsive design.
Available sizes: 's' | 'm_l' | 'xl'
